title.en: TARGETS; TARGET RANGES; BULLET CATCHERS

definition.ko: 표적 고정의 것; 이동 가능한 것; 화살 또는 투창용 F41J1/00; 7/00; 9/00; 3/00 반사표적, 활동표적 F41J2/00 표적 명중 지시기 또는 기록기 F41J5/00 표적대; 사격장 F41J1/10; 1/18 탄알받이 F41J13/00

title.ko: 표적, 표적대; 표적지지체(F41J 2/00-F41J 11/00이 우선; 탄알받이와 조합된 표적 F41J 13/02)
title.en: Targets; Target stands; Target holders (F41J0002000000-F41J0011000000 take precedence; targets combined with bullet catchers F41J0013020000)

title.ko: 재료, 구조 또는 표면에 특징이 있는 표적원반(F41J 5/044가 우선)
title.en: Target discs characterised by their material, structure or surface (F41J0005044000 takes precedence)
for ordnance, e.g. cannons; for attacking by aircraft; Full-scale models imitating target objects, e.g. tanks, aircraft
Target stands; Target holders
Reflecting targets, e.g. radar-reflector targets; Active targets transmitting electromagnetic waves
Active targets transmitting infrared radiation
Targets for arrows or darts, e.g. for sporting or amusement purposes
Indicators or score boards for arrow or dart games
Target indicating systems; Target-hit or score detecting systems
Photo-electric hit-detector systems

title.ko: 전기식 명중표시 시스템; 전기적 접촉 또는 스위치의 작동에 의한 명중표시
title.en: Electric hit-indicating systems; Detecting hits by actuation of electric contacts or switches
Targets having two or more electrically- conductive layers for short-circuiting by penetrating projectiles
one of the layers being in the form of discrete target sections

title.ko: 다수의 전기적 접촉을 가진 표적, 분리된 표적부분에 각각 상응하여 그것의 운동에 의하여 작동되는 것(F41J 5/056이 우선)
title.en: Targets comprising a plurality of electric contacts, each corresponding to a discrete target section and being actuated by the movement thereof (F41J0005056000 takes precedence)
Switch actuation by hit-generated mechanical vibration of the target body, e.g. using shock or vibration transducers

title.ko: 음향식 명중표시 시스템, 즉 충격파를 탐지하는 것 (F41J 5/056이 우선)
title.en: Acoustic hit-indicating systems, i.e. detecting of shock waves (F41J0005056000 takes precedence)
Infrared hit-indicating systems
Cinematographic hit-indicating systems (cinematographic targets F41J0009140000)
for indicating the distance by which a bullet misses the target (F41J0005020000-F41J0005100000 take precedence)
Apparatus for signalling hits or scores to the shooter, e.g. manually operated, or for communication between target and shooter; Apparatus for recording hits or scores
Manually evaluating scores, e.g. using scoring plugs or gauges; Apparatus for evaluating scores on targets after removal from the target holder

title.ko: 표적에 명중되었을 때 기계적으로 작동되거나 움직이는 명중표시수단을 가진 표적, 예. 표적판 또는 깃발(명중시 표적이 사라지거나 움직이는 것 F41J 7/04)
title.en: Targets having hit-indicating means actuated or moved mechanically when the target has been hit, e.g. discs or flags (the target as a whole disappearing or moving when hit F41J0007040000)
indicating which part of the target has been hit, i.e. the score
the indicating means being a dispensing device

title.ko: 명중되었을 때 특별한 효과를 발생하는 표적, 예. 꽃불 장약의 폭발, 벨소리, 사진
title.en: Targets producing a particular effect when hit, e.g. detonation of pyrotechnic charge, bell ring, photograph

title.ko: 명중 시 폭발 또는 분해되는 것(F41J 9/16이 우선)
title.en: exploding or disintegrating when hit (F41J0009160000 takes precedence)
Movable targets which are stationary when fired at
movable for checking
disappearing when hit
Bobbing targets, i.e. targets intermittently or unexpectedly appearing

title.ko: 가동표적, 즉 발사 시에 움직이고 있는 것(F41J 2/00이 우선)
title.en: Moving targets, i.e. moving when fired at (F41J0002000000 takes precedence)
Land-based targets
Sea-going targets
towed
Airborne targets, e.g. drones, kites, balloons
towed
Cinematographic targets, e.g. moving-picture targets
Clay-pigeon targets; Clay-disc targets
Traps or throwing-apparatus therefor
with spring-operated throwing arm
cocked by manual action
cocked by electromechanical means
operated by fluid means
operated by manual action
characterised by using a magazine of targets
characterised by means for obviating the anticipation of the flight path
Target ranges
Safety means therefor
Bullet catchers
combined with targets
